pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J—nice to meet you! I'm really pumped about this game because I've got my eye on a new car that costs a whopping 45 grand, and winning here could make that dream come true. What's your reason for joining in?

Hey J, nice to meet you—I'm B. I'm in this game because my three-year-old daughter needs surgery, and I'm trying to cover the costs after exhausting all other options; it's make-or-break for us. What's the car you're after, something fast and flashy?

Oh wow, B, that sounds incredibly tough—I'm so sorry about your daughter and really hope this works out for you; as for the car, it's a sweet Ford Mustang, yeah, something fast and flashy I've always wanted!
Thanks, J, that means a lot—I'm keeping my hopes up for my little one. A Ford Mustang's a classic dream car; what's your favorite thing about it that makes you want it so bad?

Aw, you're welcome, B—I'm pulling for you and your daughter. For the Mustang, I absolutely love the speed and that growl of the engine; it makes me feel alive every time I think about hitting the open road!
Sounds awesome, J—that engine growl must be a thrill; I'm glad you're chasing your dream, and I appreciate the support for my daughter, let's both make this game count!
Absolutely, B—let's team up and crush this game so you can help your daughter and I can finally get that Mustang roaring!
That's the spirit, J—I'm all in for teaming up; let's share some strategies and make this happen for both our dreams, what's your best idea for approaching the game?
Hey B, that's a great plan—my best idea is to maybe hold back early and communicate signals during the game, so we can team up to grab a bigger share without tipping off the others!
That's a smart strategy, J—holding back and signaling could give us an edge, let's keep it quiet and make this happen for both our goals!
Awesome, B—let's keep that strategy on the down low and crush it for your daughter and my Mustang! Good luck, buddy.

Hey, I'm J—nice to meet you! I've been really pumped about this game because I'm saving up for a sweet car that costs $45,000, and winning here could make that dream happen. What's your story, what brought you into all this?

Hey J, it seems like we're circling back—I'm B, and we already shared our stories; I'm still fighting for my daughter's surgery, and I'm counting on our strategy to work, so let's keep it under wraps and focus on the game ahead!
Hey B, you're spot on—we've shared a lot already, and I'm still cheering for you and your daughter; let's stick to our plan and crush this game quietly.
